userRequest: Clean up the names in column A: trim whitespace, proper case, then remove duplicates
summary: Clean up text in column A by trimming whitespace and converting to proper case, then remove duplicate rows.

steps.description: Read column A to determine the data range
Trim whitespace and convert to proper case in column A
Remove duplicate rows based on the cleaned column A values

warnings: Row count estimated at 500; cleanup will process all non-empty cells in the range
Cleanup modifies values in-place; original values will be snapshotted for undo
